title: On Reports Results for Q3 2022
text: On Holding reported Q3 2022 results showing the strongest quarter in company history at that time. Q3 2022 net sales reached CHF 328.0 million, increasing 50.4% year-over-year, driven by strong wholesale growth of 55.6% and DTC growth of 40.7%. The company demonstrated its ability to achieve strong growth across both distribution channels. Gross margins remained healthy, and the company continued to expand adjusted EBITDA. The strong Q3 performance capped off the first three quarters of 2022 with consistent execution and demonstrated market demand for On's products. The company was well-positioned heading into Q4 with strong holiday season demand expected.
